case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. CAYANONG, JEOFFREY B.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAYANONG, JEOFFREY B. $335.99 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $418.99
